---
title: "Spectrogram Widget"
---

## Overview

Developer documentation for `SpectrogramWidget`, which displays spectrograms of analog signals showing frequency content over time.

## Source Location

`src/WhiskerToolbox/Plots/SpectrogramWidget/`

## Architecture

*TODO: Document widget architecture, state management, and key classes.*

## Key Classes

- `SpectrogramWidget` — Main widget class

## See Also

- [Plot Widget Guide](../plot_widget_guide.md)
